caption: Two men sit side-by-side in a room, reacting to a video playing on a screen in front of them. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace. Behind them, a glowing yellow neon sign reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" above a shelf filled with media cases. An inset video window shows scenes from a cinematic production. In the first scene, a man is visible with the subtitle, "It is your duty to protect every part of your empire." The following scene shows a person holding a large, ornate sword. In the final scene, a woman appears with the subtitle, "The only one who poses a threat to Denmarkland is...". Throughout the sequence, the two men maintain neutral, focused expressions, with the man on the right resting his fingers near his mouth.
